title: How a timber importer avoided $340K in tariff exposure by re-routing through ASEAN
excerpt: A European timber importer faced an unexpected 14% tariff surge on direct China-to-EU shipments under new CBR rules. Our audit identified a duty-free corridor via Vietnam, saving $340K annually.

title: Supply chain audit reveals 67% supplier concentration risk for EU auto parts distributor
excerpt: A concentration analysis of an EU auto parts distributor's semiconductor sourcing showed 67% dependency on two Taiwanese foundries. We modelled a 90-day disruption scenario and mapped 11 alternative qualified suppliers.
